name: Banana Chip Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and sugars until smooth.
2. Add the egg and vanilla, mixing well.
3. Stir in the mashed bananas and flour mixture.
4. Fold in the chocolate chips.
5. Pour the mixture into a greased 9x3 inches pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes.
